programs.title: Backpack Serbia
programs.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programs.title: With Love From Mauritius
programs.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programs.title: XP Guide
programs.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programs.title: Unwind
programs.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programs.title: Food Fact Fun
programs.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programs.title: Food Fact Fun
programs.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.
